component.name: Kopuz
component.summary: Fast, modern music player with local library and Jellyfin support

description.p: Kopuz is a fast, modern music player built with Rust and the Dioxus framework. It scans your local music folders and organizes them into a browsable library by artist and album. Features include full playback controls, an immersive fullscreen player, dynamic theming, and system media integration. And also We have Jellyfin server integration. To listen to your music from your Jellyfin server.
Sqlite migration, mini player, tray icon implementation and more added.
Youtube music is now first class supported and bug fixes.

Bug fixes for linux, and now linux local side is way more better because we added limit to image sizes (since bigger = more computing = less performance) and if the image size is over the limit app lowers quality, a lot of server side bugs fixed and local too.
New Vaxry theme is here, Radio stations are here too, made improvements for all platform, scrollable volume bar added, switched to cubic volume bar for better volume control experience.

Bug fixes for linux, and now linux local side is way more better because we added limit to image sizes (since bigger = more computing = less performance) and if the image size is over the limit app lowers quality, a lot of server side bugs fixed, crossfade and gapless has added.
Eq, bug fixes and more translations
Technical improvements and better linux performance
Updated whole app, now it works better.
Added Jellyfin server integration, portable Linux installer, and Flatpak support.
